title: Linked Deaths
description: A speedrun/challenge mod. You have one life shared between however many players. Inspired By Martincitopants and SMii7Y
body:
A speedrun/challenge mod for players. You have one life shared between however many players. Inspired By Martincitopants and SMii7Y.

Mod is required on both server and client for the best experience.

When you person dies, everyone gets switched to spectator (can be changed in config) and teleported to where the person died (can be changed in config) so you can all laugh, or yell, at them. 

Has been tested primarily between two players so let me know if there are any bugs or features you might want added.

Thanks for downloading!
